question: When is the next training coming up?
answer: Trainings take place from time to time whether its a Project based training or NCDMB sponsored Training, the important thing for you to do is to make sure your credentials and certificates are uploaded and updated on the Portal, then if you have been selected for any of the training you will be notified via your email.

question: Is their provision for ensuring gainful employment after undergoing training to avoid resource waste
I read Geology n register 4 NOGIC JQS as an individual since 2012 and up till date hv not been call
answer: Kindly ensure that your information is up to date on the NOGICJQS Portal as selection is based on certain criteria.
